				Welcome to Blessed Beach Weddings Where Dreams Do Come True! We are an All-Inclusive, Full Service, One-Stop Shop for all your wedding needs. We offer Elopements, Commitment Ceremonies, Weddings, Vow Renewals, and Receptions. We offer our services and packages up and down the Coasts of South Carolina, North Carolina, Virginia, Florida’s First Coast and Georgia. With some of the most popular beaches on the East Coast, we have a service, package, or location to make Your Dream Come True!
